name: 333D Limited
analysis: T3D has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 83% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (4.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0480, stop A$0.0218, target A$0.0550 (0.27:1) — then trail it.
